title: Parasitics Re-evaluation Audit (M2.17)
description: Audit of an LLM/RAG per-net parasitic value re-evaluation. One object per run, written to generated/parasitics_reevaluated.json. For every non-ground net it records the deterministic prior bands and, when the LLM proposed one, the refined min/typ/max bands with confidence, rationale and citations, plus the typ-value delta. Only typ values are ever applied as user overrides; the bands and citations live here.

run_id.description: Run identifier; matches the privacy log results/llm/<run_id>.jsonl.

value_source.description: Provenance: rule_of_thumb = deterministic calculator prior kept; llm_rag = LLM-refined with a cited source; engineering_estimate = LLM-proposed with no citation.

refined.description: Refined bands, or null when the net kept its deterministic prior (LLM error / omission / unusable band).

typ_delta_pct.description: Percent change of the refined typ vs the prior typ (present only when refined != null).
